name: ccc-sales-process
description: Daniel's end-to-end Gap-Selling-grounded sales process for CCC consulting engagements: pre-call preparation with Current/Future-state hypotheses + Kanter-threat objection mapping, discovery-roleplay rehearsal scoring against the 4-step discovery + CRM Challenge, post-call logging with Behavioural Signals + Pipeline State (Current / Future / Gap / Intrinsic Motivation / Decision Criteria / Buying Process / Next Yes), gap-anchored proposal drafting with HTML-to-PDF rendering, value-based pricing analysis, and deal-rescue messaging using the I'm-confused-you-said reframe for stalled, dark, and price-objection situations. Built on Keenan's Gap Selling (2018) integrated with CCC's Problem Identification Chart.
